summary: Read-only plan: #83511 remains the live canonical issue for final-mode Telegram TTS delete-and-resend churn. #42539 is related but not a duplicate because it requests a broader configurable TTS delivery mode/product option for separate text and voice messages.

actions.reason: #83511 is open, hydrated, non-security, and is the best canonical for the specific final-mode Telegram TTS churn root cause.

#42539 is in the same Telegram TTS delivery family, but it asks for a configurable separate-delivery feature rather than the same final-mode delete-and-resend root cause, so it should not be closed as a duplicate in this cluster.
